nasb.text: Then Jeremiah came from Topheth, where the Lord had sent him to prophesy; and he stood in the court of the Lord’s house and said to all the people:

esv.text: Then Jeremiah came from Topheth, where the Lord had sent him to prophesy, and he stood in the court of the Lord’s house and said to all the people:

cnv.text: 耶利米從陀斐特，就是從耶和華差遣他去說預言的地方回來，他站在耶和華殿的院中，對眾民說：

ccb.text: 耶利米奉耶和华之命到陀斐特说预言回来后，站在耶和华殿的院子中对百姓说：
